title: The Territorial Army Act, 1948
full_text: The Territorial Army Act, 1948 प्रादेशिक सेना अधिनियम, 1948 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 194856 Act Number: 56 Enactment Date: 1948-09-10 Act Year: 1948 Short Title: The Territorial Army Act, 1948 Hindi Title: प्रादेशिक सेना अधिनियम, 1948 Long Title: An Act to provide for the constitution of a Territorial Army. Ministry: Ministry of Defence Department: Department of Military Affairs Enforcement Date: 10-09-1948 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Territorial Army Act, 1948 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and application. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Constitution of the Territorial Army. Section 4. Personnel of the Territorial Army. Section 5. Officers. Section 6. Persons eligible for enrolment. Section 6A. Liability of certain persons for compulsory service in the Territorial Army. Section 7. Liability for military service. Section 7A. Reinstatement in civil employ of persons required to perform military service. Section 7B. Preservation of certain rights of persons required to perform military service. Section 8. Discharge. Section 9. Application of the Army Act, 1950. Section 10. Summary trial and punishment. Section 10A. Punishment for failure to lodge forms duly filled up, etc. Section 11. Jurisdiction to try offences. Section 12. Presumption as to certain documents. Section 13. Persons subject to this Act to be deemed part of regular forces for certain purposes. Section 14. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 15. Repealed.
